items.name: soft-blur-in
items.title: Soft Blur In
items.description: Per-character fade-in with a gentle blur and upward motion. Apple's signature hero-title reveal.

items.name: per-character-rise
items.title: Per Character Rise
items.description: Letters slide up from below with no blur — crisp, deliberate, kinetic.

items.name: bottom-up-letters
items.title: Bottom-Up Letters
items.description: Letters rise from below in a pronounced staircase, one symbol at a time, with zero blur.

items.name: top-down-letters
items.title: Top-Down Letters
items.description: Letters descend from above in a pronounced staircase, one symbol at a time, with zero blur.

items.name: spring-scale-in
items.title: Spring Scale In
items.description: Words pop in with a soft overshoot scale, like a physical spring settling into place.

items.name: micro-scale-fade
items.title: Micro Scale Fade
items.description: A calm, tiny scale pop used as subtle premium polish for labels and headings.

items.name: scale-down-fade
items.title: Scale Down Fade
items.description: Subtle premium settle-in with a restrained scale-down fade on exit.

items.name: blur-out-up
items.title: Blur Out Up
items.description: Words arrive clean and depart upward with increasing blur for airy exits.

items.name: focus-blur-resolve
items.title: Focus Blur Resolve
items.description: A premium focus pull from heavy blur to crisp text, then a soft blur-out exit.

items.name: line-by-line-slide
items.title: Line-by-Line Slide
items.description: Each line enters from the left with a staggered slide and exits to the right for a flowing paragraph reveal.

items.name: per-word-crossfade
items.title: Per-Word Crossfade
items.description: Words gently fade into place one after another, with a short vertical drift for a calm keynote rhythm.

items.name: fade-through
items.title: Fade Through
items.description: A Material-style content transition: old fades out, new fades in with a soft delay.

items.name: shared-axis-y
items.title: Shared Axis Y
items.description: Per-word hard-cut transition with staircase timing for sharp editorial swaps.

items.name: shared-axis-z
items.title: Shared Axis Z
items.description: Scale-based shared-axis transition for focus shifts and context depth.

items.name: short-slide-right
items.title: Short Slide Right
items.description: The whole phrase glides in from the left as one compact move while words reveal in sequence through opacity.

items.name: kinetic-center-build
items.title: Kinetic Center Build
items.description: A word appears in the center; each new word enters from the right and pushes the line until the full phrase locks centered.

items.name: short-slide-down
items.title: Short Slide Down
items.description: Each new word drops in from above into its own line and pushes the stack downward until a centered three-line composition locks in place.

items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter
items.description: Character-by-character text reveal with a deterministic blinking cursor.

items.name: inline-highlight
items.title: Inline Highlight
items.description: Animates one word inside a sentence from a base color to a brand color.

items.name: strikethrough-replace
items.title: Strikethrough Replace
items.description: Draws a strike line across old text then reveals new text in its place.

items.name: staggered-fade-up
items.title: Staggered Fade Up
items.description: Words fade in and slide up one after another with a configurable delay.

items.name: mask-reveal-up
items.title: Mask Reveal Up
items.description: Lines reveal upward with a soft masked feel and compact stagger.

items.name: tracking-in
items.title: Tracking In
items.description: Letter-spacing collapses and blur clears with a springy motion.

items.name: shimmer-sweep
items.title: Shimmer Sweep
items.description: Light shine sweeps across muted text via background-clip:text.

items.name: marker-highlight
items.title: Marker Highlight
items.description: Colored marker block draws behind a phrase as the text color shifts.

items.name: slot-machine-roll
items.title: Slot Machine Roll
items.description: Vertical reel scrolls characters from one value to another.

items.name: matrix-decode
items.title: Matrix Decode
items.description: Random scramble resolves left-to-right into the target text.

items.name: rgb-glitch-text
items.title: RGB Glitch Text
items.description: Three RGB-offset text copies jitter for a brief glitch window.

items.name: infinite-marquee
items.title: Infinite Marquee
items.description: Seamlessly looping horizontal text strip with optional stroke style.

items.name: shader-mesh-gradient
items.title: Shader Mesh Gradient
items.description: WebGL mesh gradient backdrop driven per-frame for deterministic Remotion renders.

items.name: shader-grain-gradient
items.title: Shader Grain Gradient
items.description: Grainy multi-stop gradient that drifts slowly with film-grain texture over the blend.

items.name: shader-warp
items.title: Shader Warp
items.description: Domain-warped color field that folds and stretches like liquid.

items.name: shader-swirl
items.title: Shader Swirl
items.description: Concentric bands swirling around a center point.

items.name: shader-water
items.title: Shader Water
items.description: Caustic water-surface ripples with subtle refraction.

items.name: shader-spiral
items.title: Shader Spiral
items.description: Rotating spiral arms radiating from the center.

items.name: shader-liquid-metal
items.title: Shader Liquid Metal
items.description: Molten metallic surface with flowing specular highlights.

items.name: shader-color-panels
items.title: Shader Color Panels
items.description: Overlapping translucent color panels sliding past each other.

items.name: shader-neuro-noise
items.title: Shader Neuro Noise
items.description: Organic neural-web noise field that slowly morphs.

items.name: shader-perlin-noise
items.title: Shader Perlin Noise
items.description: Classic Perlin noise clouds drifting across the frame.

items.name: shader-simplex-noise
items.title: Shader Simplex Noise
items.description: Simplex noise flow field, smoother than Perlin.

items.name: shader-voronoi
items.title: Shader Voronoi
items.description: Animated Voronoi cells shifting and re-tessellating.

items.name: shader-dot-orbit
items.title: Shader Dot Orbit
items.description: Dots orbiting on concentric paths across the frame.

items.name: shader-dithering
items.title: Shader Dithering
items.description: Ordered-dither shading over an animated gradient field.

items.name: shader-god-rays
items.title: Shader God Rays
items.description: Volumetric light rays radiating from an off-screen source.

items.name: shader-smoke-ring
items.title: Shader Smoke Ring
items.description: Soft smoke ring curling and dissipating in place.

items.name: shader-metaballs
items.title: Shader Metaballs
items.description: Organic blobs merging and splitting like lava.

items.name: shader-pulsing-border
items.title: Shader Pulsing Border
items.description: Glowing border frame that pulses around the edges.

items.name: simulated-cursor
items.title: Simulated Cursor
items.description: Animated mouse cursor moving between waypoints with click ripple feedback.

items.name: swirl-dissolve
items.title: Swirl Dissolve
items.description: A swirl shader transition that unwinds open and winds shut to reveal the next scene.

items.name: dither-dissolve
items.title: Dither Dissolve
items.description: A dithering shader transition that dissolves one scene into the next.

items.name: perlin-dissolve
items.title: Perlin Dissolve
items.description: A perlin-noise shader transition that sweeps its noise threshold to dissolve one scene into the next.

items.name: smoke-dissolve
items.title: Smoke Dissolve
items.description: A smoke-ring shader transition that expands the ring outward to reveal the next scene.

items.name: wave-wipe
items.title: Wave Wipe
items.description: A grain-gradient wave that sweeps up across the frame, covering the outgoing scene and revealing the next one from below.

items.name: ripple-zoom
items.title: Ripple Zoom
items.description: A grain-gradient ripple transition that flies the camera through the center of the rings while the next scene approaches from the depth.

items.name: grain-dissolve
items.title: Grain Dissolve
items.description: A grain-gradient shader transition that disintegrates the outgoing scene into soft grainy shapes and condenses the next scene out of the noise.

items.name: warp-dissolve
items.title: Warp Dissolve
items.description: A domain-warp shader transition that melts the outgoing scene into a folding color field and straightens back out into the next.

items.name: whip-pan
items.title: Whip Pan
items.description: A whip-pan transition that flies both scenes through the frame in one move with velocity-based motion blur.

items.name: push-through
items.title: Push Through
items.description: A dolly transition that blows the outgoing scene past the camera while the next one approaches from the depth.

items.name: focus-pull
items.title: Focus Pull
items.description: A rack-focus transition that defocuses the outgoing scene into a bright blur and resolves the next one into focus.

items.name: zoom-blur
items.title: Zoom Blur
items.description: A depth punch-in transition that pushes the outgoing scene through the viewer while the incoming one resolves out of blur.

items.name: rolodex-flip
items.title: Rolodex Flip
items.description: Cycles a word through a list of values with a 3D rolodex card flip while an invisible sizer keeps the line width and baseline stable.

items.name: value-swap
items.title: Value Swap
items.description: Swaps a value in place with a vertical slide — the old value exits up as the new one enters from below while an invisible sizer keeps the width stable.

items.name: chat-to-preview-layout
items.title: Chat to Preview Layout
items.description: Two-column layout where chat shrinks and preview expands.

items.name: animated-line-chart
items.title: Animated Line Chart
items.description: Line chart whose SVG path draws on from left to right with a leading dot.

items.name: animated-bar-chart
items.title: Animated Bar Chart
items.description: Bars spring up from the baseline in a staggered cascade.

items.name: terminal-simulator
items.title: Terminal Simulator
items.description: Terminal window that types out commands and rolls old lines off the top.

items.name: terminal-cursor-zoom
items.title: Terminal Cursor Zoom
items.description: Camera locked to the typing cursor, dollying across a terminal as a command types at high zoom.

items.name: progress-steps
items.title: Progress Steps
items.description: Multi-step pipeline with sequentially activating nodes and filling lines.

items.name: data-flow-pipes
items.title: Data Flow Pipes
items.description: Glowing data packets travel along SVG bezier pipes between system nodes, leaving fading trails.

items.name: glass-code-block
items.title: Glass Code Block
items.description: A premium frosted-glass code editor window with a regex tokenizer and line-by-line stagger reveal.

items.name: glass-code-walk
items.title: Glass Code Walk
items.description: A camera that scans a glass code block top to bottom as it types, then pulls back to a centered hold.

items.name: perspective-marquee
items.title: Perspective Marquee
items.description: A 3D-tilted infinite marquee with depth-of-field blur on items rolling toward the horizon.

items.name: ecosystem-constellation
items.title: Ecosystem Constellation
items.description: A central logo orbited by integration satellites with pulsing data lines.

items.name: live-code-compilation
items.title: Live Code Compilation
items.description: Split-screen where typed code on the left snaps a live UI preview on the right, HMR-style.

items.name: infinite-bento-pan
items.title: Infinite Bento Pan
items.description: A camera diagonally drifts across an oversized bento grid behind a soft vignette.

items.name: github-sponsors
items.title: GitHub Sponsors
items.description: Self-drawing Sponsors heart that docks to a header, every sponsor avatar blur-staggering into a grid, then a thank-you headline and a CTA. Single seek-safe timeline, 270 frames at 30fps.

items.name: github-stars
items.title: GitHub Stars
items.description: Inertial fly-through of a repo's stargazers with a synced count-up odometer that locks on the total. Horizontal 16:9 or vertical 9:16.

items.name: number-wheel
items.title: Number Wheel
items.description: Mechanical odometer that rolls an integer up or down to its target, direction inferred from the values.

items.name: rolling-number
items.title: Rolling Number
items.description: Odometer where every place rolls at its own speed, new places rising into view, settling exactly on the target value.

items.name: x-follow-card
items.title: X Follow Card
items.description: Animated X profile follow card — spring bounce-in, staggered blur-in, a synthetic cursor that clicks Follow and flips it to Following. Light/dark, horizontal or vertical.

items.name: x-followers-overview
items.title: X Followers Overview
items.description: X follow notifications cycle through as 3D flipping text — '<name> followed you · 7h' — then the total follower count pops in with a confetti burst. Hardcoded sample list (X API ready). Light/dark, horizontal or vertical.

items.name: claude-chat
items.title: Claude Chat
items.description: Animated Claude chat input — types a prompt character-by-character and the waveform button morphs into a terracotta send button the moment text appears. Warm light/dark themes.

items.name: chat-gpt
items.title: ChatGPT
items.description: Animated ChatGPT composer — types a prompt into the pill input, the blue voice button morphs into a send button, and the suggestion chips fade out. Light/dark themes.

items.name: v0
items.title: v0
items.description: Animated Vercel v0 composer — types a prompt into the dark textarea and the mic button morphs into a send button. Dark/light themes.

items.name: claude-code
items.title: Claude Code
items.description: Animated Claude Code CLI welcome screen — terminal window with a dashed welcome box, recent activity and what's new panels, and a prompt line that types a command with a block cursor. Dark/light themes.

items.name: opencode
items.title: OpenCode
items.description: Animated OpenCode TUI welcome screen — two-tone wordmark, an input box with a blue accent bar that types a query, a model status line, and command hints. Dark/light themes.

items.name: confetti
items.title: Confetti
items.description: Deterministic confetti burst for Remotion — seeded particles with gravity, spin, and flutter so every render is identical. Fire it on any frame as a celebratory overlay.

items.name: backdrop
items.title: Backdrop
items.description: Configurable full-frame background (color / gradient / image / live component) with Screen Studio-style padding and a rounded, shadowed content frame.

items.name: drift
items.title: Drift
items.description: A slow linear camera push-in wrapper that scales its scene from 1 to 1+grow across the sequence so no frame is ever static.

items.name: logo-enter
items.title: Logo Enter
items.description: A stacked group of round brand chips that spring in one-by-one, then hold. Swap the logos to feature any set of marks. Horizontal or vertical stacking.

items.name: remocn-ui
items.title: remocn UI Core
items.description: Shared timeline-fold hook, theme context, and color math for remocn UI primitives.

items.name: spinner
items.title: UI Spinner
items.description: A deterministic spinning arc that loops on the Remotion frame — a pure motion atom with no state.

items.name: caret
items.title: UI Caret
items.description: A blinking text caret — a controlled vertical bar, or a pure motion atom that blinks deterministically from useCurrentFrame.

items.name: button
items.title: UI Button
items.description: A button whose idle/hover/press/loading/success state is a pure function of the timeline; the loading state composes the Spinner motion atom.

items.name: accordion
items.title: UI Accordion
items.description: A disclosure whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the panel reveal, chevron, and background are keyframed presets.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: UI Alert Dialog
items.description: A modal alert dialog whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the backdrop dim and popup zoom are keyframed presets. Self-contained — pair it with the Button as a trigger (see the example).

items.name: dialog
items.title: UI Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the backdrop dim and popup zoom are keyframed presets, with a close button and a primary action. Self-contained — pair it with the Button as a trigger (see the example).

items.name: sheet
items.title: UI Sheet
items.description: A side panel whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the backdrop dim and right-edge slide-in are keyframed presets, with a close button and a primary action. Self-contained — pair it with the Button as a trigger (see the example).

items.name: drawer
items.title: UI Drawer
items.description: A bottom panel whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the backdrop dim and bottom-edge slide-up are keyframed presets, with a drag handle and a primary action. Self-contained — pair it with the Button as a trigger (see the example).

items.name: checkbox
items.title: UI Checkbox
items.description: A checkbox whose checked/unchecked state is a pure function of the timeline; the box fill, border, and checkmark draw are keyframed presets.

items.name: radio
items.title: UI Radio
items.description: A radio whose checked/unchecked state is a pure function of the timeline; the ring border and inner dot pop are keyframed presets.

items.name: switch
items.title: UI Switch
items.description: A switch whose checked/unchecked state is a pure function of the timeline; the track fill and sliding thumb are keyframed presets.

items.name: input
items.title: UI Input
items.description: A text input whose idle/hover/active/typing/invalid state is a pure function of the timeline; the focus ring, border, caret, and value reveal are keyframed presets.

items.name: blur-in
items.title: UI Blur In
items.description: A wrapper that reveals a single child with blur + opacity + a directional offset; a pure state atom, theme-independent — its context is a motion config (blur/distance/axis), not a theme.

items.name: field
items.title: UI Field
items.description: A static layout family for composing labeled form controls, modeled on shadcn's Field: FieldGroup ▸ Field ▸ FieldLabel / FieldControl / FieldDescription. Reads no frame and holds no state — colors come from the resolved theme. FieldControl is a relative fixed-height slot for the absolute remocn-ui controls (Input, Button).

items.name: select-item
items.title: UI Select Item
items.description: A select option row whose idle/hover/press/selected state is a pure function of the timeline; the row background, label color, and check icon are keyframed presets. Composed inside the Select panel.

items.name: select
items.title: UI Select
items.description: A select whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the trigger reuses the Button primitive and the reveal panel composes SelectItem rows. The panel fade, scale, lift, and chevron are keyframed presets.

items.name: dropdown-menu-item
items.title: UI Dropdown Menu Item
items.description: A dropdown menu action row whose idle/hover/press state is a pure function of the timeline; the row background and label color are keyframed presets. Composed inside the DropdownMenu panel.

items.name: tabs
items.title: UI Tabs
items.description: A tabs widget whose active-tab state is a pure function of the timeline; the sliding indicator, label colors, and panel crossfade are keyframed/derived presets.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: UI Dropdown Menu
items.description: A dropdown menu whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the trigger reuses the Button primitive and the reveal panel composes DropdownMenuItem rows. The panel fade, scale, lift, and chevron are keyframed presets.

items.name: cursor
items.title: UI Cursor
items.description: An animated cursor that moves between waypoints, clicks (ripple), and drags. The Cursor renderer is a pure function of a numeric CursorStyle channel; useCursorPath reads the frame and eases the path, ripple, and press phases.

items.name: toast
items.title: UI Toast
items.description: A toast notification whose hidden/visible state is a pure function of the timeline. The Toast renderer is a pure function of a ToastStyle (opacity, translateY, scale); useToastTransition eases both the slide-in enter and the auto-dismiss exit. Variants default/success/error change the leading icon and its color.

items.name: command-menu-item
items.title: UI Command Menu Item
items.description: A command-palette row whose idle/hover/press/selected state is a pure function of the timeline. Leading icon + label + trailing shortcut kbd. Exports an inline CommandMenuItemRow (reused by CommandMenu) and a standalone CommandMenuItem atom; the row background, label color, and icon color are keyframed presets.

items.name: command-menu
items.title: UI Command Menu
items.description: A ⌘K command palette whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the panel zoom + backdrop dim are dialog-like keyframed presets. The search row reveals the typed query, the list is filtered by a pure case-insensitive substring on the visible query prefix, and rows reuse the CommandMenuItem row.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: UI Tooltip
items.description: A tooltip whose hidden/visible state is a pure function of the timeline. The Tooltip renderer is a pure function of a TooltipStyle (opacity, scale, translate); useTooltipTransition eases both the show and the hide. The static `side` prop sets the enter translate axis and the arrow placement.

items.name: progress
items.title: UI Progress
items.description: A progress bar whose fill is a pure function of a numeric value channel (value-channel deviation). The Progress renderer takes a clamped 0–100 value; useProgressTransition reads the frame and eases the fill between value steps. Muted track + primary indicator, optional floored percentage label.

items.name: skeleton-block
items.title: UI Skeleton Block
items.description: A shimmer placeholder block — a motion atom (spinner pattern). A directional highlight gradient sweeps across deterministically from useCurrentFrame() and loops seamlessly. Configurable width/height/radius/speed and base/highlight colors.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: UI Skeleton
items.description: A skeleton→content crossfade whose loading/loaded state is a pure function of the timeline. The Skeleton renderer is pure (reads no frame); only the composed SkeletonBlock shimmer reads it. SkeletonStyle opacities sum to 1 so the box never dims; real children sit in normal flow and the placeholder (a lines/card layout or a custom node) is an absolute overlay.

items.name: slider
items.title: UI Slider
items.description: A slider whose fill is a numeric value channel plus a thumb idle/hover/press channel (dual-channel value-channel deviation). The Slider renderer is pure (clamped 0–100 value, thumb scale, grab-ring opacity); useSliderTransition reads the frame and eases both channels — value as a numeric lerp, the thumb visual from its state presets. Muted track + primary range + bordered thumb with a derived grab ring.

items.name: combobox
items.title: UI Combobox
items.description: A combobox whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the panel fade/scale/lift are keyframed presets like select. The trigger reuses the Input presets (typed query + caret reveal via an injected inputStyle), the list is filtered by a pure case-insensitive substring on the visible query prefix, and rows reuse the SelectItem row.

items.name: popover
items.title: UI Popover
items.description: A popover/hover-card whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline. The Popover renderer is a pure function of a PopoverStyle (opacity, scale, translate); usePopoverTransition eases both the open and the close. The static `side` prop sets the enter translate axis; renders title + description and/or arbitrary children in a popover card.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: UI Context Menu
items.description: A right-click context menu whose opened/closed state is a pure function of the timeline; the panel scales from its top-left corner (the click point) with a fade + lift. No trigger — the caller positions it. Rows reuse the DropdownMenuItem row; items are plain string labels.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: UI Toggle Group
items.description: A segmented control whose active value is a pure function of the timeline; a raised thumb SLIDES between segments (position + width derived from a float indicator offset, no jumps) and the labels crossfade color via mixOklch. The tabs precedent without content panels.

items.name: stepper
items.title: UI Stepper
items.description: A horizontal onboarding stepper whose progress is a pure function of a continuous step index (value-channel deviation). Every circle (fill, number, stroke-dash check) and connector (primary fill fraction) derives purely from the float position; useStepperTransition reads the frame and eases position between step indices.

items.name: resizable
items.title: UI Resizable
items.description: Two panels split by a draggable handle, where the split ratio is a numeric channel plus a handle idle/hover/press channel (dual-channel value-channel deviation). The Resizable renderer is pure (clamped 0–1 ratio, handle scale, grab-ring opacity); useResizableTransition reads the frame and eases both channels — ratio as a numeric lerp, the handle visual from its state presets. Horizontal and vertical splits; 1px divider + centered grip pill with a derived grab ring.

items.name: signup-flow
items.title: UI Signup Flow
items.description: A signup card composition: a real shadcn-style card (header, labeled Full Name / Email / Password / Confirm fields, primary + Google-outline buttons, sign-in footer) whose cursor fills each field top-to-bottom, then clicks Create account (hover → press → loading → success) as a success toast slides in. A pure orchestrator — every channel comes from a composed primitive's transition hook.

items.name: ai-prompt-flow
items.title: UI AI Prompt Flow
items.description: An AI prompt composition: a prompt types into the field, the Generate button runs hover → press → loading, a skeleton shimmer reveals, then crossfades into the generated answer, and a ready toast slides in. A pure orchestrator — the shimmer is owned by the skeleton-block motion atom; every other channel comes from a composed primitive's hook.

items.name: checkout-flow
items.title: UI Checkout Flow
items.description: A cursor-driven checkout card: the card and its fields blur-in, then the pointer flips a billing-cycle toggle, types a card number, ticks the terms checkbox, and presses Pay through to success, ending in a toast. A pure orchestrator — every channel comes from a composed primitive's transition hook.

items.name: onboarding-stepper-flow
items.title: UI Onboarding Stepper Flow
items.description: A multi-step onboarding composition: a horizontal stepper advances through panels of input, radio, and switch fields, finishing on a Finish button that runs to success. Panel crossfade derives linearly from the stepper's exposed position channel; every other channel comes from a composed primitive's hook.

items.name: settings-toggle-flow
items.title: UI Settings Toggle Flow
items.description: A two-column settings card: the card and its controls blur-in, then the cursor flips a switch, opens a select, drags a labeled slider, and clicks Save, ending in a saved toast. A pure orchestrator — every channel comes from a composed primitive's transition hook.

items.name: message-bubble
items.title: UI Message Bubble
items.description: A chat message bubble whose hidden/visible state is a pure function of the timeline. The renderer is a pure function of a MessageBubbleStyle (opacity, translateY, scale); useMessageBubbleTransition eases the rise-in enter. The incoming/outgoing variant resolves bubble color and alignment from the theme, and an optional reaction badge pops in on its own channel.

items.name: typing-indicator
items.title: UI Typing Indicator
items.description: A continuous typing animation: N dots bounce with a staggered sine wave. A motion atom — it reads the frame and takes color, size, gap, and speed props, defaulting to currentColor so it inherits the bubble it sits in.

items.name: chat-flow
items.title: UI Chat Flow
items.description: A messaging composition: an outgoing message types into the composer, the send button presses, and the bubble rises in; the other side shows a typing indicator that swaps into the reply, and reactions pop in. A pure orchestrator — every channel comes from a composed primitive's hook (Input, MessageBubble, TypingIndicator).

items.name: telegram-chat-flow
items.title: UI Telegram Chat Flow
items.description: A Telegram-styled messaging composition: tailed bubbles (white incoming, blue outgoing) with in-bubble timestamps and delivery checks, a header that flips to 'typing…' while the other side replies, reaction chips, and a Telegram composer that types the outgoing message before sending. Self-contained — it owns its timeline and only composes the caret primitive.

items.name: imessage-chat-flow
items.title: UI iMessage Chat Flow
items.description: An iMessage-styled messaging composition: gray incoming and blue outgoing bubbles with tails, an in-thread typing bubble with dots, a Delivered label, and tapback-style reaction badges. The composer types the outgoing message before sending. Chrome icons come from lucide-react; self-contained otherwise, composing the caret and typing-indicator primitives.

items.name: icons-core
items.title: Icons Core
items.description: Shared animation contract, pure frame-to-phase timeline, and SVG path-draw helpers for remocn icons.

items.name: icon-check
items.title: Check
items.description: Animated Lucide check icon — the stroke draws on, then stamps with a spring pop to mark a step, task, or claim as done.

items.name: icon-check-circle
items.title: Check Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide circle-check icon — the ring draws clockwise, the checkmark traces in, then the whole mark pops to confirm a completed or successful state.

items.name: icon-x
items.title: X
items.description: Animated Lucide x icon — the two diagonals draw in crosswise, then the mark shakes to punctuate an error, removal, or dismissal.

items.name: icon-activity
items.title: Activity
items.description: Animated Lucide activity icon — the pulse line sweeps through like an EKG, popping at the peak. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-alert-triangle
items.title: Alert Triangle
items.description: Animated Lucide triangle-alert icon — the outline draws on, the mark pops in, then the exclamation blinks to flag a risk or warning.

items.name: icon-info
items.title: Info
items.description: Animated Lucide info icon — the ring draws clockwise, the dot pops and stem draws in, then the dot bobs to draw a gentle, neutral note.

items.name: icon-loader
items.title: Loader
items.description: Animated Lucide loader-circle icon — the arc draws on, then spins continuously for a loading or processing beat. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-refresh-cw
items.title: Refresh Cw
items.description: Animated Lucide refresh-cw icon — the two arcs draw on, arrowheads pop, then the whole mark spins in cycles for sync, retry, or up-to-date messaging. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-search
items.title: Search
items.description: Animated Lucide search icon — the lens draws on, the handle extends, then the magnifier sweeps a small scanning path for a search or discovery beat.

items.name: icon-bell
items.title: Bell
items.description: Animated Lucide bell icon — the body draws on, the clapper follows, then the bell swings from its mount to signal a notification or alert.

items.name: icon-download
items.title: Download
items.description: Animated Lucide download icon — the tray draws on, the arrow fades in, then drops into the tray with a squash on impact for a download or export beat.

items.name: icon-upload
items.title: Upload
items.description: Animated Lucide upload icon — the tray draws on, the arrow fades in, then launches upward with a spring for an upload, publish, or submission beat.

items.name: icon-copy
items.title: Copy
items.description: Animated Lucide copy icon — the two sheets draw back-to-front, then the front sheet lifts and settles to read as a duplicate for a copy-to-clipboard beat.

items.name: icon-settings
items.title: Settings
items.description: Animated Lucide settings icon — the gear and center draw on, then the gear turns exactly one tooth for a settings, configuration, or customization beat.

items.name: icon-trash
items.title: Trash
items.description: Animated Lucide trash-2 icon — the can draws on, then the lid flips open and the contents vanish for a delete or cleanup beat.

items.name: icon-plus
items.title: Plus
items.description: Animated Lucide plus icon — the two strokes draw on, then the mark twirls 90deg with a scale pop for an energetic add or create beat.

items.name: icon-send
items.title: Send
items.description: Animated Lucide send icon — the paper plane draws on, then darts forward with a wind-up and settles back for a send-message beat.

items.name: icon-heart
items.title: Heart
items.description: Animated Lucide heart icon — the outline draws on, then a lub-dub heartbeat pulse for likes, favorites, or built-with-love moments.

items.name: icon-star
items.title: Star
items.description: Animated Lucide star icon — the outline draws on, then twinkles into place with a small rotate and scale pop for ratings, favorites, or star callouts.

items.name: icon-thumbs-up
items.title: Thumbs Up
items.description: Animated Lucide thumbs-up icon — the hand draws on, then springs up with an approving stamp for positive reviews, approvals, or social-proof beats.

items.name: icon-party-popper
items.title: Party Popper
items.description: Animated Lucide party-popper icon — the cone draws on, then confetti bursts outward as the cone recoils for launch, milestone, or celebration finales.

items.name: icon-arrow-right
items.title: Arrow Right
items.description: Animated Lucide arrow-right icon — the shaft and head draw on, then the arrow nudges forward for CTAs, next-step pointers, or flow direction.

items.name: icon-arrow-left
items.title: Arrow Left
items.description: Animated Lucide arrow-left icon — the shaft and head draw on, then the arrow nudges back for back navigation or 'previously' callbacks.

items.name: icon-arrow-up
items.title: Arrow Up
items.description: Animated Lucide arrow-up icon — the shaft and head draw on, then the arrow nudges up for growth, improvement, or upward-trend beats.

items.name: icon-arrow-down
items.title: Arrow Down
items.description: Animated Lucide arrow-down icon — the shaft and head draw on, then the arrow nudges down for cost/latency reduction beats or scroll cues.

items.name: icon-external-link
items.title: External Link
items.description: Animated Lucide external-link icon — the box and arrow draw on, then the arrow darts out toward the top-right for 'view on GitHub', external docs, or open-in-new-tab beats.

items.name: icon-play
items.title: Play
items.description: Animated Lucide play icon — the triangle draws on, then presses in and springs forward like a play button being hit.

items.name: icon-pause
items.title: Pause
items.description: Animated Lucide pause icon — the two bars draw on, then pinch toward each other and settle like a held breath.

items.name: icon-skip-forward
items.title: Skip Forward
items.description: Animated Lucide skip-forward icon — draws on, then dashes forward past center and snaps against its end bar.

items.name: icon-volume-2
items.title: Volume 2
items.description: Animated Lucide volume-2 icon — the speaker draws on, then the two sound waves ripple outward one after the other.

items.name: icon-volume-x
items.title: Volume X
items.description: Animated Lucide volume-x icon — the speaker draws on, then the X slashes in and the glyph shakes off the sound.

items.name: icon-mic
items.title: Mic
items.description: Animated Lucide mic icon — draws on, then the capsule bounces twice like a level meter picking up voice.

items.name: icon-video
items.title: Video
items.description: Animated Lucide video icon — draws on, then the lens wedge pans out and snaps back to its shot.

items.name: icon-camera
items.title: Camera
items.description: Animated Lucide camera icon — draws on, then the lens blinks shut and open like a shutter firing.

items.name: icon-image
items.title: Image
items.description: Animated Lucide image icon — the frame draws on, then the mountain redraws and the sun drifts into place like a photo developing.

items.name: icon-chevron-up
items.title: Chevron Up
items.description: Animated Lucide chevron-up icon — draws on, then nudges upward with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-chevron-down
items.title: Chevron Down
items.description: Animated Lucide chevron-down icon — draws on, then nudges downward with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-chevron-left
items.title: Chevron Left
items.description: Animated Lucide chevron-left icon — draws on, then nudges left with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-chevron-right
items.title: Chevron Right
items.description: Animated Lucide chevron-right icon — draws on, then nudges right with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-menu
items.title: Menu
items.description: Animated Lucide menu icon — the three bars slide in from the left, top to bottom, each overshooting into place.

items.name: icon-more-horizontal
items.title: More Horizontal
items.description: Animated Lucide more-horizontal icon — three dots pop in, then do a left-to-right thinking wave.

items.name: icon-maximize
items.title: Maximize
items.description: Animated Lucide maximize icon — four corner brackets draw on, then fly outward and spring back like a window going fullscreen.

items.name: icon-layout-grid
items.title: Layout Grid
items.description: Animated Lucide layout-grid icon — four tiles draw on, then re-pop into place clockwise like a dashboard assembling.

items.name: icon-pencil
items.title: Pencil
items.description: Animated Lucide pencil icon — draws on, then scribbles: the pencil rocks around its tip as if writing.

items.name: icon-share-2
items.title: Share 2
items.description: Animated Lucide share-2 icon — three nodes draw on, then the connections re-trace and the receiving nodes pop as the share lands.

items.name: icon-filter
items.title: Filter
items.description: Animated Lucide filter icon — the funnel draws on, then gives two quick shakes as results fall through.

items.name: icon-eye
items.title: Eye
items.description: Animated Lucide eye icon — draws on, then blinks once and refocuses its pupil.

items.name: icon-eye-off
items.title: Eye Off
items.description: Animated Lucide eye-off icon — the eye fragments draw on, then the slash cuts through and visibility dims.

items.name: icon-rocket
items.title: Rocket
items.description: Animated Lucide rocket icon — draws on, then lifts off: the ship rises on a tilt while the flame re-ignites, then eases back to rest.

items.name: icon-save
items.title: Save
items.description: Animated Lucide save icon — the disk draws on, then presses down and writes: the label slot re-draws as data commits.

items.name: icon-link
items.title: Link
items.description: Animated Lucide link icon — two chain halves draw on, pull apart, and click together.

items.name: icon-bookmark
items.title: Bookmark
items.description: Animated Lucide bookmark icon — draws on, then drops into place from above with a spring landing.

items.name: icon-lock
items.title: Lock
items.description: Animated Lucide lock icon — the body draws on, then the shackle lifts and slams shut with a confirming pop.

items.name: icon-key
items.title: Key
items.description: Animated Lucide key icon — draws on, then turns in an invisible lock and springs back.

items.name: icon-log-out
items.title: Log Out
items.description: Animated Lucide log-out icon — draws on, then the arrow steps out through the door frame with a fading echo.

items.name: icon-mail
items.title: Mail
items.description: Animated Lucide mail icon — the envelope draws on, then the flap re-traces open and the whole envelope pops: you've got mail.

items.name: icon-message-circle
items.title: Message Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide message-circle icon — the bubble draws on, then inflates from its tail like a message arriving.

items.name: icon-phone
items.title: Phone
items.description: Animated Lucide phone icon — draws on, then rings: three decaying rotation oscillations around center.

items.name: icon-at-sign
items.title: At Sign
items.description: Animated Lucide at-sign icon — the inner 'a' draws and pops, then the outer swoosh re-traces its tail: a mention landing.

items.name: icon-inbox
items.title: Inbox
items.description: Animated Lucide inbox icon — the tray draws on, then dips under the weight of an arriving item and springs back.

items.name: icon-shield
items.title: Shield
items.description: Animated Lucide shield icon — draws on, then braces: a firm guard pulse that asserts protection.

items.name: icon-help-circle
items.title: Help Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide help-circle icon — the ring draws on, then the question mark re-draws and tilts like a curious head.

items.name: icon-plus-circle
items.title: Plus Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide plus-circle icon — the ring draws on, the plus crosses in, then the whole badge pops.

items.name: icon-x-circle
items.title: X Circle
items.description: Animated Lucide x-circle icon — the ring draws on, the X slashes in, and the badge shakes once: firmly rejected.

items.name: icon-calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Animated Lucide calendar icon — the pad draws on, then the binder rings dip and the page snaps into place.

items.name: icon-clock
items.title: Clock
items.description: Animated Lucide clock icon — the face draws on, then the hands sweep through discrete ticks. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-timer
items.title: Timer
items.description: Animated Lucide timer icon — draws on, then the start button clicks and the hand sweeps: the stopwatch is running.

items.name: icon-home
items.title: Home
items.description: Animated Lucide home icon — the house draws on, then the door re-draws open and the house settles: welcome home.

items.name: icon-folder
items.title: Folder
items.description: Animated Lucide folder icon — draws on, then the folder tips open for a peek and closes.

items.name: icon-file-text
items.title: File Text
items.description: Animated Lucide file-text icon — the page draws on, then the text lines type themselves in, top to bottom.

items.name: icon-code
items.title: Code
items.description: Animated Lucide code icon — the angle brackets draw on, pull apart, and snap back around their code.

items.name: icon-target
items.title: Target
items.description: Animated Lucide target icon — three rings draw in from outside, then the bullseye hits: inner dot pops and the board shudders.

items.name: icon-terminal
items.title: Terminal
items.description: Animated Lucide terminal icon — draws on, then the prompt nudges forward and the cursor blinks twice.

items.name: icon-database
items.title: Database
items.description: Animated Lucide database icon — the cylinder draws on, then a write lands: the top disc pops and data settles down the stack.

items.name: icon-cloud
items.title: Cloud
items.description: Animated Lucide cloud icon — draws on, then floats: a weightless bob and a half before settling.

items.name: icon-globe
items.title: Globe
items.description: Animated Lucide globe icon — draws on, then the meridian sweeps west to east like the world turning. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-monitor
items.title: Monitor
items.description: Animated Lucide monitor icon — the stand draws, then the screen powers on with a CRT-style unsquash.

items.name: icon-smartphone
items.title: Smartphone
items.description: Animated Lucide smartphone icon — draws on, then buzzes: three fast vibration oscillations.

items.name: icon-sun
items.title: Sun
items.description: Animated Lucide sun icon — the core draws on, then eight rays fan out clockwise and the sun swells: sunrise.

items.name: icon-moon
items.title: Moon
items.description: Animated Lucide moon icon — draws on, then rocks gently into place: settling in for the night.

items.name: icon-shopping-cart
items.title: Shopping Cart
items.description: Animated Lucide shopping-cart icon — draws on, then rolls forward to checkout, wheels popping as it stops.

items.name: icon-credit-card
items.title: Credit Card
items.description: Animated Lucide credit-card icon — the card draws on, then the stripe swipes through and the card tips: payment accepted.

items.name: icon-crown
items.title: Crown
items.description: Animated Lucide crown icon — descends into place from above, lands with a pop, then rocks regally to rest.

items.name: icon-dollar-sign
items.title: Dollar Sign
items.description: Animated Lucide dollar-sign icon — draws on, then the sign stretches tall: understated cha-ching.

items.name: icon-tag
items.title: Tag
items.description: Animated Lucide tag icon — draws on, then swings from its hole like a price tag flicked by a shopper.

items.name: icon-package
items.title: Package
items.description: Animated Lucide package icon — the box draws on, lands with a squash-and-stretch, then the tape seam seals it.

items.name: icon-gem
items.title: Gem
items.description: Animated Lucide gem icon — the stone draws on, then light catches it: facets re-trace in sequence with a flicker and a pop.

items.name: icon-gift
items.title: Gift
items.description: Animated Lucide gift icon — draws on, then the lid lifts for a peek and lands with a ribbon pop: almost unwrapped.

items.name: icon-wallet
items.title: Wallet
items.description: Animated Lucide wallet icon — draws on, then the wallet thickens with a quiet x-scale: money in.

items.name: icon-award
items.title: Award
items.description: Animated Lucide award icon — the medal draws on, the ribbon unfurls beneath it, then the medal swings to rest.

items.name: icon-bar-chart-3
items.title: Bar Chart 3
items.description: Animated Lucide bar-chart-3 icon — the axis draws on, then three bars rise left to right with overshoot: the classic growth chart.

items.name: icon-trending-down
items.title: Trending Down
items.description: Animated Lucide trending-down icon — the line descends across, then the arrowhead lands with damped weight.

items.name: icon-trending-up
items.title: Trending Up
items.description: Animated Lucide trending-up icon — the line climbs across, then the arrowhead pops at the peak.

items.name: icon-trophy
items.title: Trophy
items.description: Animated Lucide trophy icon — draws on, then hoists: the cup hops with a pop at the apex while its handles flash in.

items.name: icon-user
items.title: User
items.description: Animated Lucide user icon — draws on, then gives a small presence nod: head dips as shoulders rise to meet it.

items.name: icon-users
items.title: Users
items.description: Animated Lucide users icon — the front figure draws on and pops, then the second figure slides in from behind: the team assembles.

items.name: icon-user-plus
items.title: User Plus
items.description: Animated Lucide user-plus icon — the figure draws on, then the plus strokes draw in and pop: a new member added.

items.name: icon-sparkles
items.title: Sparkles
items.description: Animated Lucide sparkles icon — the main sparkle draws on, the accents pop, then a looping twinkle for AI, magic, or premium highlights. Loops by default.

items.name: icon-zap
items.title: Zap
items.description: Animated Lucide zap icon — the bolt draws in fast, then flashes with a double blink for speed, performance, or instant-result claims.

items.name: icon-flame
items.title: Flame
items.description: Animated Lucide flame icon — the outline draws on, then flickers with a looping scale-and-skew wobble for hot features, trending items, or streaks. Loops by default.
